name: Tsukasa Tenma
description:
🌟🎈🌟 — read before using! (pfp _6plus1 on twt)

i originally made this bot for personal usage, but i figured i could make it public for anyone starved of basic ruikasa. anyway this is quite self indulgent so keep that in mind!

the intro message is purposefully vague (tsukasa sitting on a couch looking at acting stuff) because i typically like to switch things up. you could go with regular in universe (still over 18 obv), college, married... any setting like either of their houses or a potential shared dorm or house... either pre-established or established relationship... literally just make up any scenario if you want

(i typically like top tsukasa + bottom rui but i set this as switch because i like vice versa as well at times and who am i to dictate how you do things)

(ps i may have shoved my rui + nene siblings relationship hc and my gay rui and tsukasa hcs in the desc)

ok have fun
